code:
sequenceDiagram Note over Content timeline: [Education_ClassroomService]] is null
[Education_ClassroomService]] is null Note over Device timeline: [Education_ClassroomService]].[Education_ContentCDN]] is "available" Content timeline ->> Device timeline: mapAsync(Education_StudentDB) Note over Content timeline: [Education_LMS_Portal]] is null
[Education_StudentDB]] is non-null Note over Device timeline: [Education_StudentDB]].[Education_ContentCDN]] is "unavailable" Device timeline ->> Content timeline: mapAsync(Education_ClassroomService) response Note over Device timeline: [Education_StudentDB]].[Education_ContentCDN]] is "unavailable" Note over Content timeline: [Education_LMS_Portal]] is non-null
[Education_StudentDB]] is null Content timeline ->> Device timeline: unmap(Education_LMS_Portal) Note over Content timeline: [Education_LMS_Portal]] is null
[Education_StudentDB]] is null Note over Device timeline: [Education_ContentCDN]].[Education_StudentDB]] is "available"

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为教育系统的资源映射流程画一个时序图。核心场景是：Content时间线和Device时间线之间的异步映射操作，涉及ClassroomService、ContentCDN、LMS_Portal和StudentDB这几个关键组件。
明白。我注意到有两个时间线主体：Content timeline和Device timeline。初始状态是ClassroomService为空，而Device端ContentCDN标记为"available"对吗？然后第一步是Content向Device发起mapAsync(StudentDB)？
对的。执行mapAsync后，Content端的LMS_Portal变为空，StudentDB变为非空；同时Device端StudentDB到ContentCDN的链路变为"unavailable"。
好的，我已经添加了第一步映射和状态变更。接下来Device向Content回传mapAsync的response，然后需要处理unmap操作？
是的，response之后状态保持：Device端StudentDB-ContentCDN仍为"unavailable"。但Content端发生变化——LMS_Portal变为非空，StudentDB被清空为null。这时Content要向Device发起unmap(LMS_Portal)。
unmap执行后，两端都回到初始的空状态吗？LMS_Portal和StudentDB都变为null？
没错。最终状态：Content端LMS_Portal和StudentDB都是null；Device端ContentCDN到StudentDB的链路恢复为"available"。
完成了。整个流程展示了教育系统中资源从Content到Device的异步映射与释放，包括状态流转和可用性切换。我检查一下Note的位置都对应正确的时间线。
